name: threads_scraper
title: Threads Scraper
description: Retrieve public Threads profiles, creator posts, individual posts, keyword results, and indexed user matches without login.

seo.title: Threads Scraper API for Profiles, Posts, and Search
seo.description: Retrieve public Threads profiles, creator timelines, individual posts, and keyword search results for agents.
seo.intro: Threads Scraper combines server-rendered public metadata with Better Fetch browser rendering to cover profiles, creator posts, individual posts, and keyword discovery without a logged-in account.

useCases.title: Creator research
useCases.description: Resolve public Threads profiles to their bio, follower label, thread count, and avatar.

useCases.title: Timeline monitoring
useCases.description: List the public post URLs, timestamps, and visible text from a creator profile.

useCases.title: Conversation discovery
useCases.description: Search public Threads posts by keyword and pass normalized results into an agent workflow.

useCases.title: Account discovery
useCases.description: Find public profile handles exposed in Google's index when native account search requires login.

faqs.question: Does this require Threads login?
faqs.answer: No. The implemented modes use pages visible to logged-out visitors.

faqs.question: Does it support private profiles?
faqs.answer: No. Only public profile and post surfaces are supported.

faqs.question: Why does timeline search use a browser?
faqs.answer: Threads renders public result cards after page load; Better Fetch captures that rendered state.

faqs.question: How does user search work?
faqs.answer: It transparently searches Google's public index because native Threads account search requires login.

username.description: Public Threads username or profile URL for profile and user_posts modes.

post_url.description: Public Threads post URL for post mode.

query.description: Keyword query for search or indexed username query for search_users mode.
